title: Technical Advisor
description:
Position Summary

  • Field Technical advisor on the construction of Advanced Gas Turbine Cogeneration Combined Cycle Plantupplied by Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Ltd.’s (MHI) supplier for Meranti Site Construction
  • To give the technical instruction and direction for the progress, schedule, and work quality of Advanced Gas Turbine Cogeneration Combined Cycle Plant.

Job responsibility

Technical Advice

  • Provide technical advice on the construction for Advanced Gas Turbine Cogeneration Combined Cycle Plant.

Technical Reporting

  • Provide a regular progress report to site mechanical manager and head office in Japan

Project Management

  • Coordination of site meetings

Job Requirement

  • At least 15 years of experience in construction of Gas Turbine Combined Cycle power plant
  • Advanced knowledge of equipment installation, piping work and electrical instrumentation work for Gas Turbine Combined Cycle power plant.
  • Advanced knowledge of gas turbine, steam turbine, generator, heat recovery steam generator and auxiliary equipment.
  • English fluency (Upper Intermediate or above) is required for this role
  • MS Office (Excel, Word, Access, PowerPoint, Outlook)
  • Knowledge in using SolidWorks & AutoCad
  • Work experience at construction sites.

postedCompany.description:
Mitsubishi Power Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. is one of the leading suppliers of equipment and services for the power generation industry in the region. We are committed to paving the way for countries, economies, and communities in Asia Pacific to transition to a low-carbon energy future.

Our focus is on enabling energy security and decarbonizing power for the rapidly growing Asia Pacific region. We design, manufacture and service industry-leading power generation technologies and solutions, such as advanced-class gas turbines, solid-oxide fuel cells (SOFCs), as well as carbon capture, utilization and storage (CCUS) technology, needed for the regions transitions to more sustainable energy. We are also spearheading the development of the digital power plant of the future through our suite of TOMONI™ solutions.

The Asia Pacific region has witnessed significant economic growth over the past few decades and has an exciting future of growth and development ahead. We are humbled to be a part of this region’s success and are focused on making sure that our technologies and solutions are aligned with the strategies of our customers, governments, communities and partners across the region to help realize a low-carbon society while driving economic development.

Complementing our extensive experience and long-term strategic partnerships in Asia Pacific is our deep understanding of the the diverse cultures and distinct needs of the region. This intersection of expertise allows us to effectively customize strategies and solutions for each country and community as they transition to better energy.
postedCompany.name: MITSUBISHI POWER ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD.
